verses.text: En un, Topa in leitung hawmsuak sakin gamkhing suaksak ding a, amah in lei maitang huiheek gawpin, a tunga a teng mite thehthang gawp ding hi
Mi khempeuhte' thuakna kibang kim ding hi. Siampite leh mi mawkmawkte silate leh a tote, van leite leh van zuakte, sumneite leh leibate, a hau a zawng, a thuakna uh kibang ding hi
Leitung kihawmsuak sakin kisiacip ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in hih thu gen khinzo hi
Leitung vulin keugaw a, leitung buppi thanemin vulgawp hi. Vantung leh leitung a nih tuakin vulkhawm hi
Ama tunga a tengte in leitung ninsak uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in thukhamte khialin ngeina kipte palsat uh a, tawntung thuciamna peel uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin Topa in leitung samsiatin susia a, a tunga a teng mite in amau' mawhna hangun a thuak uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin leitungah a teng mite tawm semsem hi
Leengguite keutumin leenggahzu tawm semsem a, a lungdam mi khempeuh khuisa ta uh hi
Lungdamna khuang gingte dai-in lungdama gamlumnate om nawnlo a, lungdama laia tawh lasaknate a dai ta hi
Zu phungah lungdama lasakna om nawnlo a, zu khempeuh kisia-in khagawp ta hi
Khuapi hawmsuak pen kisiacip ta a, kuamah a tum theihlohna dingin inn khempeuh kikhakcip hi
Leenggahzu a duh manun kongzingah mite kiko uh hi. Lungdamna khempeuh mangthang khinta a, leitung kipahna teng kibeisak ta hi
Khuapi sungah gamkhin'na bek om a, kongpite kisat khamin kisiamang khinta hi
Hih bangmahin leitungah a om mi khempeuh tungah a hong tung ding ahi hi. Oliv kung a kisin' khit ciang, leenggah kilo khinin a sangte a kikaihkhop khit ciangin a kinusia lo hawmte tawh kibang ding hi
A suaktasun mite in lungdamin la sa ding uh hi. Nitumna lama om mite in Topa a liat mahmahna thu gen ding uh hi
Nisuahna lama om mite in Topa phat ding uh hi. Tuipi dunga teng mite in Topa, Israel-te' Pasian phat ding uh hi

Leimong a gamla pek pan nangawnin a thuman Israel minamte a kiphatna la i za ding hi. Ahih hangin keimah in, “Ka lungkham hi; ka lungkham hi. Gimna ngah hi ta ing! Bang hang hiam cih leh mi khemte in khemkhem lai-in sia semsem uh a, khemzawh thu mah ciamciam lai uh hi,” ka ci hi
Leitunga a teng mite aw, note-a' dingin launa, gum leh thangzakte om hi
Lauhuaina panin a tai mipa gum sungah kia ding a, gum sung panin a taikhiat ciangin thangzak sungah awk ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh van panin guahpi hong bua sukin leitung bulpite kiling ding hi
Leitung khangkhamin kilokgawp ding a, kiphelkham ding hi
Leitung pumpi zukham bangin hoi ding a, huihpi' mutgawp buk bangin awn ding hi. Ama mawhnate in nengcip gawp ding a, amah pukin thokikzo ngei nawnlo ding hi
Tua ni ciangin Topa in vantunga om mihonpite leh leitung kumpite gim pia ding hi
Dum sunga om thongkiate bangin amaute khempeuh kikaikhawm ding hi. Thong sungah amaute kikhaknelh ding a, ni tampi khit ciangin amaute gim kipia pan ding hi

Tua ciangin khapi mial ding a, ni taang nawnlo ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Vanglian Topa in Zion Mual tung leh Jerusalem khuasungah uk ding a, ama upate' mai-ah ama minthan'na vang kilangsak ding hi.
